Angle.Summary: Returns a random angle in [0, 2 PI)

Bool.Summary: Returns a random bool with of returning true.

Chance.Summary:
Returns a random bool with of returning true.
An alias for Rand.Bool().

Sign.Summary: Returns a random integer direction -1 or 1

Vector2Float.Summary: Returns random 2D direction within of a .

Vector2FloatFloat.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [, )

Vector2Vector2.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [.x, .y)

FloatFloatFloatFloat.Summary:
Returns random 3D direction within the given theta and phi ranges.
Takes Theta and Phi in degrees.
Theta takes values (0,360) values outside this range will contine to rotate CC facing down at the XZ plane.
Phi takes values (0,180) values above will snap back to 0 and below will snap back to 180.

Vector3FloatFloat.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [, )

Vector3Vector2.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [.x, .y)

Color.Summary: Returns a random color in , , and .

List.Summary: Returns a single uniformly random item from .

ListList.Summary:
Returns a single weighted random item from using .
Consider using Rand.Items() for multiple picks it is significantly faster.

WeightedList.Summary:
Returns a single weighted random item from .
Consider using Rand.Items() for multiple picks it is significantly faster.

ListInt.Summary: Picks uniformly random items with replacement in O(n) time.
ListInt.param: Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.

ListListInt.Summary: Picks weighted random items with replacement in O(nlog(k)) time.
ListListInt.param: Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.

WeightedListInt.Summary: Picks weighted random items with replacement in O(nlog(k)) time.
WeightedListInt.param: Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
WeightedListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.

ListInt.Summary:
Picks uniformly random items with replacement in O(n * k) time.
Consider using Rand.Take() for faster selection if modifying the input list is acceptable.
ListInt.param: Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.

ListListInt.Summary: Picks weighted random items without replacement in O(n^2) time.
ListListInt.param: Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.

WeightedListInt.Summary: Picks weighted random items without replacement in O(n^2) time.
WeightedListInt.param: Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
WeightedListInt.Returns: An array containing the selected random items.
